subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! After every hardship there cometh ease, after every agitation there followeth tranquility, and after every separation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله هر عسیریرا یسری از عقب و هر اضطرابیرا اطمینان از پی و هر فراقرا
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @Manifestation of God as sun, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
